name: Line
notes: Hold with the oriented edges as a horizontal line across the front. Open the front face. Pull the front-right edge out, move the top layer left, push it back, move the top layer right. Close the front face — both line edges flip to yellow.

name: Hook
notes: Hold with the oriented edges as a hook in the front-right. Open the front face and middle slice together. Pull the front-right edge out, move the top layer left, push it back, move the top layer right. Close both layers back — the two hook edges flip to yellow.

name: Dot
notation: F (R U R' U') F' f (R U R' U') f'
notes: Hold in any orientation. Run the Line case to orient two edges into a hook shape, then immediately run the Hook case on the result — all four edges flip to yellow in two passes.

name: Sune
notation: R U R' U (R U2 R')
notes: Hold with an oriented corner front-left and an unoriented corner front-right. Pull the front-right corner out, move the top layer left, push it back, move the top layer left again. Pull the corner out twice as far, move the top layer right twice, push it back in — yellow on top. To set up: if two corners are oriented, place an unoriented corner front-right; if none are oriented, place one front-right.

name: AntiSune
notation: (R U2 R') U' R U' R'
notes: Hold with an oriented corner back-right and an unoriented corner front-left. Pull the front-right corner out twice as far, move the top layer right, push it back, move the top layer right again, pull it out — the mirror of Sune.

name: H shape
notation: R U R' U (R U' R' U) R U2 R'
notes: Hold with headlights on both left and right. Pull the front-right corner out, move the top layer left, push it back, move left — then move right to bring the next corner into position, pull it out twice as far, push it back in. Both opposite corners orient in one pass.

name: Pi shape
notation: R U2 (R2 U') (R2 U') R2 U2 R
notes: Hold with headlights on the left. Pull the right column out twice as far. Move the top layer left, flip the column through, move left, flip through, move left, flip through. Pull the right column out twice as far to finish — all four corners orient in one pass.

name: T shape
notation: (r U R' U') (r' F R) F'
notes: Hold with the yellow block on the right. Pull the right column and middle slice out together. Move the top layer left, push the right column back, move right. Push the wide column back. Open the front face, push the right column in, close — the two remaining corners flip to yellow.

name: L shape
notation: F' (r U R' U') (r' F R)
notes: Hold with the two unoriented corners at front-right and back-left. Open the front face inward. Pull the right column and middle slice out together. Move the top layer left, push the right column back, move right. Push the wide column and front face closed together — the mirror of T shape.

name: U shape
notation: R2 D (R' U2 R) D' (R' U2 R')
notes: Hold with the yellow block at the back and headlights at the front. Flip the right column through the cube twice. Turn the bottom layer right to bring a corner into position. Pull the right column out twice, push it back twice. Restore the bottom layer. Pull the column out twice, push it back — all four corners orient.

name: T Perm
notation: (R U R' U') R' F (R2 U' R') U' (R U R' F')
notes: Hold with headlights on the left. Run the sexy move to pull the front-right corner out of its slot. Open the front face, flip the right column through twice, push the column back, move the top layer left, push the column back again. Close the front face to lock the swap — adjacent corners swap.

name: Y Perm
notation: F (R U' R' U') R U R' F' (R U R' U') R' F R F'
notes: Hold in any orientation — no headlights. Open the front face. Pull the right column out, move the top layer right, push it back, move right — pull it back out, move left, push it back. Close the front face. Run the sexy move. Open the front face, push the column in, close — opposite corners swap diagonally.

name: Ua Perm
notation: (R2 U' R') U' R (U R) (U R) U' R
notes: Hold with the solved edge block at the front and the left edge sitting opposite its centre. Flip the right column through twice to pull an edge out. Move the top layer right, pull the column back out, move right — repeat twice more, walking three edges counterclockwise around the top. Push the column back in. If there is no block or the left edge is not opposite its centre, try any orientation to find the standard case.

name: Ub Perm
notation: R' U (R' U') (R' U') R' U (R U R2)
notes: Hold with the solved edge block at the front and the right edge sitting opposite its centre. Pull the right column back in. Move the top layer left, pull the column back, move left — repeat twice more, walking three edges clockwise around the top. Push the column back out twice to finish.

name: H Perm
notation: M2 U' (M2 U2 M2) U' M2
notes: Hold in any orientation — all four edges swap in pairs. Flip the middle slice through twice. Move the top layer left, flip twice, move the top right twice, flip twice, move the top left, flip twice — front/back and left/right edges swap together.

name: Z Perm
notation: M' U' (M2 U') (M2 U') M' U2 M2
notes: Hold with the two edges to swap at front-right. Pull the middle slice back. Flip twice, move the top left, flip twice, move left, flip twice, move left. Pull the middle slice back, move the top right twice, flip twice — two pairs of adjacent edges swap diagonally.
